source_note: Validation layer for Unified Frequency Library. This file separates measured/source-derived frequencies from symbolic, supplemental, contested, or app-derived correspondences.

frequencies.name: Schumann resonance fundamental
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Associated with earth-resonance and grounding practices in this corpus.
frequencies.avoid_wording: Proves biological synchronization or treats circadian disorders.

frequencies.name: 40 Hz gamma / vibrotactile practice marker
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Used as a practice marker for vibration, attention, and sensory comparison.
frequencies.avoid_wording: Treats neurological disease or guarantees gamma entrainment.

frequencies.name: Sun
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Solar correspondence used for symbolic timing and practice selection. The Sun has differential rotation, so this is a source/corpus convention, not a single definitive solar physical constant.
frequencies.avoid_wording: Direct solar healing frequency or definitive physical emission from the Sun.

frequencies.name: Earth Year / OM
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Earth-year / OM correspondence used for centering and heart-focused practice.

frequencies.name: Pluto optional modern astrology correspondence
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Optional modern astrology correspondence for Pluto/Scorpio themes. Pluto is a dwarf planet and should not be presented as a classical planetary row.
frequencies.avoid_wording: Classical planet frequency or physical underworld transformation effect.

frequencies.name: Mercury
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Mercury correspondence used for communication and throat-focused symbolic practice.

frequencies.name: Mars
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Mars correspondence used for activation and root/fire practice themes.

frequencies.name: Saturn
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Saturn correspondence used for structure, boundary, and grounding themes.

frequencies.name: Platonic Year
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Used as a long-cycle symbolic correspondence for meditation and crown/root integration; corresponds to a 25,920-year convention, not a fixed universal constant.

frequencies.name: Jupiter
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Jupiter correspondence used for expansion, sacral/ether, and reflective practice.
frequencies.avoid_wording: Guarantees growth, luck, or health effects.

frequencies.name: Earth Day
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Earth-day correspondence used for vitality and grounding practice themes.

frequencies.name: Uranus
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Uranus correspondence used for modern Aquarius, innovation, disruption, and systems themes. This uses a higher audible octave choice.
frequencies.avoid_wording: Scientifically proven nervous-system disruption or awakening frequency.

frequencies.name: Moon Synodic
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Moon correspondence derived from the mean synodic phase cycle, used for water, sacral, emotional-flow, and night-practice themes.
frequencies.avoid_wording: Controls hormones, fertility, or mood; or the Moon's sidereal orbit frequency.

frequencies.name: Neptune
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Neptune correspondence used for modern Pisces, dream, oceanic, and dissolution themes. This uses a higher audible octave choice.
frequencies.avoid_wording: Scientifically proven dream, psychic, or fluid-body effect.

frequencies.name: Venus
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Venus correspondence used for heart, relationship, and aesthetic-practice themes. This uses a higher audible octave choice.

frequencies.name: Moon Sidereal Optional
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Optional lunar sidereal-orbit correspondence. Keep separate from the 210.42 Hz synodic phase value.

frequencies.name: Solfeggio 285
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Associated with tissue-field symbolism and restoration themes in Solfeggio practice systems.

frequencies.name: Solfeggio 396
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Associated with release/fear themes in Solfeggio practice systems.

frequencies.name: Solfeggio 417
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Associated with transition and change themes in Solfeggio practice systems.
frequencies.avoid_wording: Forces life change or emotional reset.

frequencies.name: 432 Hz tuning association
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Used as a calming musical tuning association in practice contexts.
frequencies.avoid_wording: Objectively superior or universally healing tuning.

frequencies.name: Concert A
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Reference tuning standard for comparison.

frequencies.name: Solfeggio 528
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Commonly associated with transformation in Solfeggio-based practice systems; biological repair claims are contested.

frequencies.name: Solfeggio 639
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Associated with connection and relationship themes in Solfeggio practice systems.

frequencies.name: Solfeggio 741
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Associated with expression and clearing themes in Solfeggio practice systems.

frequencies.name: Solfeggio 852
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Associated with intuition themes in Solfeggio practice systems.

frequencies.name: Solfeggio 963
frequencies.app_safe_wording: Associated with crown/pineal symbolism in Solfeggio practice systems.
frequencies.avoid_wording: Activates the pineal gland as fact.
